title: MetaTrader5
description: MetaTrader 5 trading terminal running under Wine in a container, accessible from any browser via noVNC (KasmVNC) for forex and CFD trading.
installation: MetaTrader 5 is proprietary software by MetaQuotes; there is no official MetaQuotes Docker image. This template uses the community gmag11/metatrader5_vnc image, which runs the full Windows MT5 terminal under Wine and exposes it through a KasmVNC/noVNC web desktop on port 3000. There is NO SQL database: the MT5 installation, account profiles, charts and config all live on disk under /config, so a persistent volume is mounted there and no operator add-on is used. First-run: open the web UI, let the bundled script download and install the MetaTrader5 terminal into the volume (this can take several minutes on first boot), then log in to your broker account inside the terminal. Secure the exposed noVNC desktop with the image's CUSTOM_USER / PASSWORD variables (rotate the placeholder PASSWORD below) or front it with an auth proxy, since anyone reaching the UI controls a live trading session. An optional RPyC/Python automation server is available on port 8001 if you build trading bots against it; expose it separately if needed. No SMTP, S3, Redis or external search engine is required.
